evidence: TPC-DI Spec: CustomerMgmt.xml contains customer demographics, addresses, phones
TPC-DI Spec: CustomerMgmt.xml contains account creation and updates
TPC-DI Spec: HR.csv is the sole source for broker data
TPC-DI Spec: FINWIRE CMP records contain company information
TPC-DI Spec: FINWIRE SEC records contain security/stock information
TPC-DI Spec: FINWIRE FIN records contain quarterly financial data
TPC-DI Spec: Date.txt provides pre-generated date dimension data
TPC-DI Spec: Time.txt provides pre-generated time dimension data
TPC-DI Spec: Trade.txt and TradeHistory.txt contain trade lifecycle events
TPC-DI Spec: TradeHistory.txt contains historical trade status changes
TPC-DI Spec: Trade executions create/update holdings positions
TPC-DI Spec: HoldingHistory.txt tracks position changes
TPC-DI Spec: CashTransaction.txt contains cash deposits/withdrawals
TPC-DI Spec: DailyMarket.txt contains daily stock prices and volumes
TPC-DI Spec: WatchHistory.txt tracks customer watch list events
TPC-DI Spec: Prospect.csv contains prospective customer demographics
TPC-DI Spec: StatusType.txt provides status code reference data
TPC-DI Spec: TaxRate.txt provides tax rate reference data
TPC-DI Spec: TradeType.txt provides trade type reference data
TPC-DI Spec: Industry.txt provides industry classification reference data
TPC-DI Spec: Prospect.IsCustomer is derived by matching against DimCustomer
TPC-DI Spec: DimSecurity.SK_CompanyID is looked up from DimCompany
TPC-DI Spec: DimCustomer.NationalTaxRate/LocalTaxRate looked up from TaxRate
